title: Barbenheimer
description: Mod inspired by the biggest films of the summer: Barbie and Oppenheimer
body:
I decided to make a mod on what are probably going to be the biggest films of the summer and made a mod based on Barbie and Oppenheimer.

This mod includes a Barbie and Oppenheimer boss. That can be built like a golem.

As well as many weapons and items themed on these movies.
- Uranium Ore/Gear (Casts Radiation Effect)
- Radiation Effect (Similar to Poison, but burns you too)
- Nuke (Oppenheimer)
- Ken Mob (Minion of Barbie Boss)
- Plastic Blocks (Used to craft plastic gear. Plastic gear does extra damage to sea life)
- Hazmat armor (immune to radiation effect)
